DF2DigitalCertificateExpiry.probableCause: X.509 Digital Certificate about to Expire
DF2DigitalCertificateExpiry.specificProblem: X.509 digital certificate used for interface between LI_X2 Proxy and DF2 is about to expire
DF2DigitalCertificateExpiry.additionalText: The precondition is: the specific DF2 should have been configured at system. And the service impact is: If the X.509 digital certificate is not rotated on time, then it can result in broken TLS connection between LI_X2 Proxy and DF2 destination(s)

MDF2DigitalCertificateExpiry.probableCause: X.509 Digital Certificate about to Expire
MDF2DigitalCertificateExpiry.specificProblem: X.509 Digital Certificate between LI_X2 Proxy and MDF2 is about to Expire
MDF2DigitalCertificateExpiry.additionalText: The precondiion is: the MDF2 destination(s) should have been created by ADMF. And the service impact is: If the X.509 digital certificate is not rotated on time, then it can result in broken TLS connection between LI_X2 Proxy and MDF2 destination(s)

MDF2Unreachable.probableCause: Network error, MDF2 is overloaded, LI_X2 proxy service is overloaded, MDF2 IP address is incorrectly configured in LI_X2 proxy
MDF2Unreachable.additionalText: The precondition is the specific MDF2 should have been created by ADMF. It can impact active LI tasks, whose delivery type is ‘LI_X2 delivery’ and whose destination is configured as specific MDF2, which is now, not reachable
MDF2Unreachable.proposedRepairAction: Check for MDF2 address and connection to it

DF2Unreachable.probableCause: Network error, , DF2 is overloaded, LI_X2 Proxy service is overloaded, DF2 IP address is incorrectly configured at LI_X2 Proxy
DF2Unreachable.additionalText: The precondition is the specific DFs is configured at LIMaaS. It can impact active LI tasks, whose delivery type is ‘LI_X2 delivery’ and whose destination is configured as specific DF2, which is now, not reachable
DF2Unreachable.proposedRepairAction: Check for DF2 address and connection to it

MDF2Reachable.additionalText: IRI packetes get delivered as  and  when received

TerminatingFault4G.proposedRepairAction: Check for DF2 address and connection to it

StorageExpiry.probableCause: High TPS of X2 PDUs, Storage allocated for LI_X2 Proxy module is low
StorageExpiry.additionalText: The preconditions are the MDF2 destination(s) should have been created by ADMF and the LI_X2 proxy and LI Message Handler shall have active connection. It can result into multiple terminating faults, when the storage is completely exhausted
StorageExpiry.proposedRepairAction: Check backlog kafka topic and it's storage and usage details

MDF2TLSHandshakeFailed.probableCause: Incorrect X.509 digital certificate is configured at LI_X2 Proxy, X.509 digital certificate is expired at LI_X2 Proxy, TLS version mismatch at LI_X2 Proxy and MDF2
MDF2TLSHandshakeFailed.specificProblem: TLS handshake fails with specific MDF2
MDF2TLSHandshakeFailed.additionalText: The precondition is that the specific MDF2 should have been created by ADMF. It can impact active LI tasks, whose delivery type is ‘LI_X2 delivery’ and whose destination is configured as this specific MDF2
MDF2TLSHandshakeFailed.proposedRepairAction: Check the digital certificate configured at LI_X2 Proxy

DF2TLSHandshakeFailed.probableCause: Incorrect X.509 digital certificate is configured at LI_X2 Proxy, X.509 digital certificate is expired at LI_X2 Proxy, TLS version mismatch at LI_X2 Proxy and DF2
DF2TLSHandshakeFailed.specificProblem: TLS handshake failed with specific DF2
DF2TLSHandshakeFailed.additionalText: The precondition is that the specific DFs is configured at LIMaaS. It can impact active LI tasks; whose delivery type is ‘LI_X2 delivery’ and whose destination is configured as this specific DF2
DF2TLSHandshakeFailed.proposedRepairAction: Check the digital certificate configured at LI_X2 Proxy

Configured.probableCause: Full configuration available for application to be ready
